parameters: Oh, \n[1], thanks for the other day. Now I can open for business.

...Well, even so, I think I'd make more profit if I went to the lord's mansion, so
I'd like to operate over there for a while too.

Hmm, what should I do... To keep the shop open during the day, I guess I'll have to
hire a part-timer or something...
Oh, \n[1]! Are you free now? If so, I've got a favor to ask...

I need to step out of the shop for a bit, and I'd like you to watch the store while
I'm gone. I'll pay you properly, so please do it!

You're a lifesaver~! Okay, sit here! Oh! And no matter what those old men say, don't
give in to their haggling!

...While fending off the persistent haggling of familiar customers, I somehow managed
to guard the register until the old woman returned... ...Somehow, a nasty fatigue
lingered.........
Thanks for the help, \n[1]! Here, take this! Your payment for this time!

Oh, what's up? Are you still willing to watch the shop? If so, I'll ask you to do it
in the afternoon too.
Alright! Then I'm counting on you! I'm heading out to the lord's mansion!

...Once again, I took over watching the tool shop. With nothing much to do, time
passed slowly... I stared at the clock's hands, waiting for the old woman to
return.........
Wow, thanks, \n[1]! Here, take this again! I'll give you a little reward!
-----その場のキャラの吹き出しを消す---------
あるいは、コモンイベントを実行
----------これ以降に戻ってきた後の処理をはさむ
----------------フラッシュでフェード解除
// 進行度2,0,1　二回目以降

Tch...what, \n[1]? Sorry, but...I'm busy right now... I can't deal with you right
now...oh......\SE[3]

Dario just mutters that and doesn't even try to look this way... ...? He's just
sitting there, isn't he? There aren't any other customers either, does he really want
to slack off that much...?

\SE[3]Hehe...♡ Hah, haah...♡ Oh, Elly...♡ Yeah, right there, right there♡ Oh, ohh~...♡

...It seems Dario is using Elly for his own sexual gratification again today. Not
doing any work, just toying with someone's little sister for his own lower-half
desires...! I really should say something to this bastard...!
...? \n[1]? What's up, you came to watch again? What a pain...here

Dammit, Elly... You're sucking him off while he's masturbating again...! At this
rate, you're just like...!
アニメーションセル設定

Hehe, satisfied? If you wanna see more, you gotta buy something first. Let's
see...how about one minute for every 100G...?
Tch, fine then! I'm going home...!

\SE[5]Hah, this is boring... Elly got snatched up by those old bastards... What am I even
supposed to do in a dead-end job like this........
\SE[1]C'mon, hand over the money. If you want Elly's handjob blowjob, then, hehe...♡

Haaah...sleepy... But seriously, this part-time job is way too easy... Tilling the
fields feels like a waste of time.

Heh, you lookin' for work too? Tough luck! I ain't givin' up this spot! I got the job
from the old lady first...!
Hmm...what should I do...? Oh, \n[1]? Good work...

? What am I worried about? Hmm...well, it's a bit about inventory... That thing, it's
a special order size so it's pretty hard to get...

Besides, that mess was made by your family too... As her brother, you should clean it
up properly.
...\n[1]? The toilet's still dirty. Wait, am I supposed to clean it?

If you'd been paying attention while minding the shop, that wouldn't have happened,
right? And you're just gonna leave it like that?
You must be tired... It must be tough for you too, having a sister like that...

Oh, no! I know Elly-chan isn't a bad girl or anything... It's Dario's fault, right?
Ah, haha...

...Speaking of which, it must be hard for Elly-chan, being a young girl all alone...
In my day, we still had a few people to share the burden...

But well, the men in my family are amazing in that one way... I'm sure Elly-chan is
actually pretty happy, despite how she looks? You being a man probably wouldn't
understand, huh?

Ugh...! Those stupid lovebirds bought up all the condoms again...! This is gonna make
restocking a pain...!

If you don't have any money, you should work harder. You're not getting any younger,
you know... Do you really want to stay a useless, good-for-nothing man?

Oh, \n[1]! How are you? Can I ask you to work again today? I have some errands to run,
so I need someone to cover the shop during the day.
あるいは、コモンイベントを実行
条件付きイベント実行

Is that so, hmm, what should I do... I wish there was someone else I could ask...
That Dario, he's never around when you need him...

Oh, \n[1]! How are you? Can I ask you to work again today? I have some errands to run,
so I need someone to cover the shop during the day.

Ugh, that Dario... Making me buy condoms again just to show off... And why isn't Elly
resisting...

...I gritted my teeth and kept watching as Elly was ejaculated into with condoms over
and over. It's wrong for her to go through this... I have to stop Dario soon...
あるいは、コモンイベントを実行

Is that so? Hmm, what should I do... I wish there was someone else I could ask...
That Dario, he's never around when you need him...
A condom, custom LL size...? Who on earth would they have something like this for...

...In this village, the only one who needs this is probably Dario. The right to have
sex with the only young woman in the village who requires contraception is currently
monopolized by Dario...

...The two of you are staring so intently... Could it be... this condom...? Huh, you
want to use this, don't you... Ugh...

There's probably no one left in this village who wants to buy tools like these
anymore... I wish they'd just dispose of this stuff already.
It's a cute girl doll. Mana would definitely want it, but Elly... hmm, I wonder...?

...If only Elly hadn't gone through that, I would have given this to that girl as a
present. But right now, I don't have time to spend money on something like that...
条件ごとにボイスチャンネルを変える
条件ごとにボイスチャンネルを変える
\SE[1]Ah, yeah, yeah, this! This is the only thing that fits mine! Hehe, thanks, old lady!
\SE[default]Huh? What's up, \n[1]? What did I buy? Ah... well...
\SE[2]Well, it's something a kid like you doesn't need! Don't worry about it! Gahaha!

\SE[5]...Man, this is pointlessly expensive... And why the hell do I have to buy this crap?
I don't even wanna use it.

\SE[10]Ugh... You're planning to make me pay again...? You haven't even paid the tab from

\SE[6]A-ah, o-onii-chan... Y-yeah... I came... to buy condoms again... hehe...

\SE[2]Ah~, was that it? Well, whatever, you're the one who needs it, so just pay for it out

\SE[2]Oh, \n[1]! Sorry for all the trouble the other day! Well, as an apology, I guess...

\SE[3]...I'm gonna use Elly's ass in the bathroom again today...♡ I think you already know

...The filth from the two of them fucking is stuck all over the floor... Ugh... This

...I polished the floor clean of the filth from their bodily fluids... Amidst the
